title: Prophecy Signs
entries: artists finding no inspiration for pleasant work, but an abundance of it for the harsh and hideous.
sterility across all kinds of animals.
the earth welling blood when dug or ploughed.
all birdsong becoming the same threnody.
the moon appearing as a glaring bloodshot eye.
the living dreaming of the dead mourning for them.
livestock being born as insatiable meat-eaters.
an autumn without end.
the rivers turning to blood and the mountains weeping
a song heard by all, yet sung by none
the dead refusing their eternal rest and walking the earth
shadows growing longer even in the noonday sun
the birth of a beast with eyes of fire and wings of ash
idols and icons spontaneously weeping black ichor.
misrule in all kingdoms.
colour dimming and darkness deepening.
the rebuilding of the True Sanctum, which will be the sole, hotly contested place untouched by the apocalypse.
fresh corpses rising to dig their own graves.
oracles and soothsayers all screaming at once before falling dead.
the birth of prodigal infants able to speak and walk from the moment of their first breath.
an endless storm of locusts scouring the land back and forth.
ploughs spontaneously reforging themselves into swords.
cities being overrun with wilderness and feral creatures.
the appearance of a comet like a bloody pennant.
a sickening miasma sweeping through the lowlands.
mysterious runes appearing on ancient monoliths and temples overnight.
the stars rearranging themselves into new, foreboding constellations.
waters turning acrid and unfit for consumption, taking on a metallic sheen.
auroras appearing in places they shouldn't, bringing haunting melodies with them.
frequent and uncanny solar and lunar eclipses.
shadowy apparitions of colossal beings striding the horizons.
ancient trees uprooting and wandering the land aimlessly.
migratory animals refusing to travel, instead forming protective circles.
seas and oceans churning and roaring without any apparent cause.
abandoned settlements suddenly illuminated with flickering, ghostly lights.
wild tales from fishermen of monsters they've never seen before, rising from the depths.
children born with ancient and mysterious tattoos.
the silence of the world; no wind, no rustling leaves, just stillness.
time seemingly slowing down at random intervals, making days stretch into weeks.
clouds forming disturbing patterns and images in the sky.
deserts experiencing intense frost and snowstorms.
ancient and long-dormant volcanoes suddenly coming to life.
music and laughter heard from uninhabited places.
wildlife gathering and staring in one direction, as if waiting for something.
rivers flowing in reverse, leading to unknown sources.
whispers in the wind, unintelligible but filled with urgency.
wounds that refuse to heal, continuously seeping a clear liquid.
ancient landmarks crumbling or eroding overnight.
night skies so clear that previously unseen galaxies become visible.
old prophecies, previously dismissed as myth, resurfacing and proving true.
books and scrolls rewriting themselves, their contents shifting to warnings or ominous poetry.
wells and springs drying up, revealing hidden chambers or artifacts beneath.
wild animals venturing into populated areas, not in aggression, but as if seeking sanctuary.
strange celestial events where the sun and moon seem to dance or collide.
a constant, distant drumming sound, its source never found but growing louder each day.
plants and crops maturing overnight, only to wither the next.
dreams of a great door, slightly ajar, with something unspeakable lurking behind.
mountains rumbling, not with the threat of a volcanic eruption, but as if something inside is trying to get out.
shadows that move against the light, or cast forms of things not present.
once extinct creatures seen roaming the world again.
waves without wind, rolling in rhythmic, almost ritualistic patterns.
statues and carvings weeping or bleeding.
seasons becoming unpredictable, with snowfall in summer and blossoming flowers in winter.
patterns of old runes or symbols appearing in the morning dew.
children being born with ancient memories or knowledge they shouldn’t possess.
widespread sleepwalking, with sleepwalkers congregating at ancient sites.
music and sounds from bygone eras echoing from nowhere.
inexplicable eclipses blocking out sun, moon, and stars at irregular intervals.
rivers running in reverse or changing their course overnight.
strange constellations, never before seen, lighting up the night sky.
ancient trees uprooting and relocating themselves.
time anomalies, where moments stretch for hours or days pass in the blink of an eye.
flora and fauna mutating into otherworldly variations of their former selves.
frequent meteor showers, with some meteors containing unknown materials.
sudden, unexplainable silence in areas where sound should be abundant.
forgotten deities manifesting their presence, seeking acknowledgment and reverence.
ocean waters turning thick and viscous, like syrup.
wild beasts speaking in tongues or delivering cryptic messages.
structures of unknown origin rising from the ground or descending from the skies.
unearthly auroras visible even during daylight.
clouds forming cryptic symbols or mimicking the silhouettes of monstrous creatures.
intense feelings of nostalgia for events or places one has never experienced.
mirrors reflecting unfamiliar landscapes or showing events from a different time.
a pervasive feeling of déjà vu among the masses, as if all have shared the same experience.
cold spots appearing randomly, chilling everything in their radius to the bone.
